examples: My heart is in anguish within me; the terrors of death assail me.
9from the wicked who assail me, from my mortal enemies who surround me.
Their meeting was in Jobs's conference room, where Gates found himself surrounded by ten Apple employees who were eager to watch their boss assail him.
By being unusually patient, he hopes to create businesses that rivals will find harder to assail.
Yet somehow Davis seemed to have almost unlimited money with which to assail Snow.
